name: hcportal_getKennelHashers
description: Retrieves a list of all hashers (members and followers) for a specified kennel, including their membership status, run counts, payment history from the two most recent counted events, and credit balances. Requires portal access token validation and appropriate AppAccessFlags (0x40000019 permission check). @publicKennelId changed from NVARCHAR(250) to UNIQUEIDENTIFIER in HC6. Read-only query.

parameters.name: publicHasherId
parameters.description: Auth: public hasher ID of the authenticated user. Passed to HC6.ValidatePortalAuth and also used for the AppAccessFlags authorization check.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: Public kennel ID to retrieve hashers for. Changed from NVARCHAR(250) in HC5 to UNIQUEIDENTIFIER in HC6. Validated IS NULL before auth.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

columns.name: Success
columns.description: Always 0 on error

columns.name: ErrorMessage
columns.description: Human-readable error message

rowsets.name: KennelHashersList
rowsets.description: One row per hasher who is either a current member (MembershipExpirationDate > GETDATE()) or currently following the kennel (Following = 1). Includes profile data, membership/following status, run counts, recent event payment codes, credit balances, and discount information. Ordered by displayName.

columns.name: publicHasherId
columns.description: Hasher's public ID (HC.Hasher.PublicHasherId)

columns.name: publicKennelId
columns.description: Kennel's public ID echoed back (HC.Kennel.PublicKennelId)

columns.name: hashName
columns.description: Hasher's hash name (HC.Hasher.HashName)

columns.name: firstName
columns.description: Hasher's first name (HC.Hasher.FirstName)

columns.name: lastName
columns.description: Hasher's last name (HC.Hasher.LastName)

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: Computed display name from HC.Hasher.DisplayName (computed column that respects NameDisplayPreference)

columns.name: eMail
columns.description: Hasher's email. Returned only if membership is active (MembershipExpirationDate > GETDATE()), otherwise '<hidden>'

columns.name: photo
columns.description: Hasher's photo URL. COALESCE to 'bundle://avatar-1' if NULL

columns.name: lastLoginDateTime
columns.description: Hasher's last login timestamp (HC.Hasher.LastLoginDateTime)

columns.name: inviteCode
columns.description: Invite/reset code if hasher has never logged in. Extracted from HC.Hasher.ResetCode by removing 'URC:' prefix. Empty string if hasher has previously logged in.

columns.name: isHomeKennel
columns.description: 'Yes' if this kennel matches the hasher's HomeKennelId, 'No' otherwise

columns.name: isFollowing
columns.description: 'Yes' if HC.HasherKennelMap.Following = 1, 'No' otherwise

columns.name: isMember
columns.description: 'Yes' if HC.HasherKennelMap.MembershipExpirationDate > GETDATE(), 'No' otherwise

columns.name: status
columns.description: 'Member' if membership active, 'Following' if only following (not a current member), 'None' if neither

columns.name: notifications
columns.description: Notification preference derived from HC.HasherKennelMap.KennelNotificationPreference: 0='Auto', 1='On', 2='Off', else='Unknown'

columns.name: emailAlerts
columns.description: Email alert preference derived from HC.HasherKennelMap.KennelEmailAlertPreference: 0='Auto', 1='On', 2='Off', else='Unknown'

columns.name: historicHaring
columns.description: Historical haring count (pre-HC). COALESCE to 0 (HC.HasherKennelMap.historicalHaringCount)

columns.name: historicTotalRuns
columns.description: Historical total run count (pre-HC). COALESCE to 0 (HC.HasherKennelMap.historicalTotalRunCount)

columns.name: hcHaringCount
columns.description: HC-tracked haring count for this kennel. COALESCE to 0 (HC.HasherKennelMap.hcHaringCount)

columns.name: hcTotalRunCount
columns.description: HC-tracked total run count for this kennel. COALESCE to 0 (HC.HasherKennelMap.hcTotalRunCount)

columns.name: historicCountsAreEstimates
columns.description: 'Yes' if HC.HasherKennelMap.HistoricalCountIsEstimate = 1, 'No' otherwise

columns.name: dateOfLastRun
columns.description: Date of hasher's most recent run at this kennel (HC.HasherKennelMap.DateOfLastRun)

columns.name: membershipExpirationDate
columns.description: Membership expiration date (HC.HasherKennelMap.MembershipExpirationDate)

columns.name: kennelCredit
columns.description: Kennel-specific credit balance (HC.HasherKennelMap.KennelCredit)

columns.name: discountAmount
columns.description: Discount amount applied to this hasher at this kennel (HC.HasherKennelMap.DiscountAmount)

columns.name: discountPercent
columns.description: Discount percentage applied to this hasher at this kennel (HC.HasherKennelMap.DiscountPercent)

columns.name: discountDescription
columns.description: Description of discount applied to this hasher at this kennel (HC.HasherKennelMap.DiscountDescription)

columns.name: hashCredit
columns.description: Hasher's credit balance for this kennel from HC.KennelCredit.currentBalance. COALESCE to 0.

columns.name: atLastEvent
columns.description: Payment info at the last counted run: 'EventNumber-PaymentTypeCode' (e.g. '1234-C'). '?' if no payment record found. NULL if hasher did not attend.

columns.name: atSecondToLastEvent
columns.description: Payment info at the second-to-last counted run: 'EventNumber-PaymentTypeCode'. '?' if no payment record found. NULL if hasher did not attend.

columns.name: secondToLastEventDate
columns.description: Event start datetime of the second-to-last counted run for this kennel

columns.name: lastEventDate
columns.description: Event start datetime of the last counted run for this kennel

columns.name: nextEventDate
columns.description: Event start datetime of the next upcoming counted run for this kennel

columns.name: nextEventNumber
columns.description: Event number of the next upcoming counted run (CAST to NVARCHAR(50))

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
Never change the AppAccessFlags permission bitmask (0x40000019) without coordinating with all callers
